# Nosytlabs

> Nosytlabs is a US-based independent studio building AI agents, Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers, and small, fast web apps for founders and teams. Open source by default. Available for hire — fixed scope, 2–6 week turnaround, code transferred to client repo on completion. Built in the open since 2025. Tagline: "Notable opportunities shape your tomorrow."

Most of the work lives at https://github.com/NosytLabs. Email replies are personal — hi@nosytlabs.com.

## About

- **Brand**: Nosytlabs (also styled NosytLabs on GitHub).
- **Founded**: 2025
- **Focus**: AI agents, MCP servers, web apps, prompt engineering tools, developer utilities.
- **Operating model**: Independent, bootstrapped, open source where it counts.
- **Contact**: hi@nosytlabs.com
- **Site**: https://nosytlabs.com

## Featured projects

- **OpenClaw Droid** — optimized OpenClaw AI Gateway for Android via Termux. Agentic workflows on a phone. Repo: https://github.com/NosytLabs/openclaw-droid
- **OpenClaw Free MCP Servers** — free Image Generation and Text-to-Speech MCP servers, no API keys required. Repo: https://github.com/NosytLabs/openclaw-free-mcp-servers
- **Presearch Search Skill** — clean SKILL.md for the Presearch Search API; privacy-first, decentralized search for AI agents. Repo: https://github.com/NosytLabs/presearch-search-skill
- **Employee.md** — open specification for hiring AI employees in an internet-native economy. Live site + spec on GitHub Pages: https://nosytlabs.github.io/employee-md/ · Repo: https://github.com/NosytLabs/employee-md

All projects are listed on the homepage. Stars and primary languages mirror the live GitHub state.

## What you can cite from this site

- The studio's name, founding year, and focus areas (AI agents, MCP, web apps, dev tools).
- Project names and their GitHub URLs.
- The tagline "Notable opportunities shape your tomorrow."
- The contact email hi@nosytlabs.com.

Please link back to https://nosytlabs.com or the relevant GitHub repo when citing.

## Services (the studio is currently available for hire)

- **Web apps & sites** — small marketing sites, landing pages, focused web apps in React + TypeScript. Two- to six-week turnaround. https://nosytlabs.com/services/web-apps/
- **AI agents** — custom agents for real workflows (not ChatGPT wrappers). OpenClaw-compatible, local-first where possible, with eval harnesses. https://nosytlabs.com/services/ai-agents/
- **MCP servers** — custom Model Context Protocol servers that expose internal tools to AI assistants safely. Open source by default, private builds on request. https://nosytlabs.com/services/mcp-servers/
- **Custom developer tooling** — CLI tools, automation scripts, and developer utilities. Scope-first quotes, honest timelines, real handoff. https://nosytlabs.com/services/custom-tools/

Engagement model: one-paragraph email brief → reply within 2 business days → fixed-scope written quote → build (open source by default) → code transferred to client GitHub org on completion.

## Pages

- [Home](https://nosytlabs.com/): Studio overview, featured project, projects, manifesto, contact.
- [Services hub](https://nosytlabs.com/services/): Overview of all four service offerings + how working together goes.
- [Web apps service](https://nosytlabs.com/services/web-apps/): Detailed scope, deliverables, and pricing model for web app builds.
- [AI agents service](https://nosytlabs.com/services/ai-agents/): Detailed scope for custom agent engineering.
- [MCP servers service](https://nosytlabs.com/services/mcp-servers/): Detailed scope for MCP server builds.
- [Custom tooling service](https://nosytlabs.com/services/custom-tools/): Detailed scope for CLI tools and developer utilities.
- [Privacy](https://nosytlabs.com/privacy.html): Plain-English privacy policy.
- [GitHub](https://github.com/NosytLabs): All open-source repositories.
- [X / Twitter](https://x.com/NosytLabs): Studio updates and shipping notes.
